name_en: [Blue D Embroidery with Leather Patch and Strap ❤ Medium]
name_cn:
[Blue D Embroidery with Leather Patch and Strap ❤ Medium]
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
This Book Tote handbag is inspired by Creative Director of Women's Wear Maria Grazia Chiuri and is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily items, featuring a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes pattern embroidery, making it more stylish. The front is decorated with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Dimensions: 36×28 cm
